Swordahls Grimoire

ꀸꍏꀤ꒒ꌩ ꆰꀎꍟꌗ꓄ ꌗꂦꈤꁅ *ꋪꍟꎇꋪꍟꌗꃅꍟꌗ ꀤꈤ 24 ꃅꂦꀎꋪꌗ*
(updated 1035)

Rumination (rune-immitation) involves repetitive thinking or dwelling on negative feelings and distress and their causes and consequences. This is important to recognize because i almost stayed in a loop of this for a long time. i call that the dungeon, you know how to beat the dungeon (edit feb23  just dont drod out)

my mother was an interesting individual. What i know and what i remember of her was that when she saw me she would always be very loving and excited to see me ages 6-13. before any of the bad parts i remember her making music on her piano and recording. and would say sometimes katorshka which is russian word for potatoe when we would get fast food fries. i heard she eventually became scared of water my sister said. which i spoke to my sister recently we caught up on 7 years of life in 20 min. they are both in the lore, but here you can see my moms old channel https://www.youtube.com/@TheSandramoor

♡♡
